subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the Countenance when it shone forth from the horizon of the Will of God, the Sovereign, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه اذ اشرق من افق مشیه الله الملک المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude
